creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
(In reply to Barbara Guida from comment #6)
Oh, you have .core file? Unlike infinite hang for me (on FreeBSD 11.4-STABLE r362573 amd64, now even upgraded a bit). Tried your line: "thread apply all bt" (with DEBUG=on on audacity and glib20) :

 /usr/local/bin/gdb92 /usr/local/bin/audacity
